    38	enum class VectorConstructorAction { REFERENCE_VECTOR };
    39	
    40	Vector::Vector(LogicalType type_p, buffer_ptr<VectorBuffer> buffer_p)
    41	    : type(std::move(type_p)), buffer(std::move(buffer_p)) {
    42	}
    43	
    44	Vector::Vector(LogicalType type_p, idx_t capacity, VectorDataInitialization initialize) : type(std::move(type_p)) {
    45	        Initialize(initialize, capacity);
    46	}
    47	
    48	Vector::Vector(LogicalType type_p, data_ptr_t dataptr, idx_t count) : type(std::move(type_p)) {
    49	        if (!dataptr) {
    50	                return;
    51	        }
    52	        if (!type.IsValid()) {
    53	                throw InternalException("Cannot create a vector of type INVALID!");
    54	        }
    55	        if (type.IsNested()) {
    56	                throw InternalException("Cannot create a nested vector from a single data pointer");
    57	        }
    58	        if (type.InternalType() == PhysicalType::VARCHAR) {
    59	                buffer = make_buffer<VectorStringBuffer>(dataptr, count);
    60	        } else {
    61	                buffer = make_buffer<StandardVectorBuffer>(dataptr, count);
    62	        }
    63	}
    64	
    65	Vector::Vector(const VectorCache &cache) : type(cache.GetType()) {
    66	        ResetFromCache(cache);
    67	}
    68	
    69	Vector::Vector(const Vector &other, VectorConstructorAction) : type(other.type) {
    70	        Reference(other);
    71	}
    72	
    73	Vector::Vector(const Vector &other, const SelectionVector &sel, idx_t count) : type(other.type) {
    74	        Slice(other, sel, count);
    75	}
    76	
    77	Vector::Vector(const Vector &other, idx_t offset, idx_t end) : type(other.type) {
    78	        Slice(other, offset, end);
    79	}
    80	
    81	Vector::Vector(const Value &value) : type(value.type()) {
    82	        Reference(value);
    83	}
    84	
    85	Vector::Vector(Vector &&other) noexcept : type(std::move(other.type)), buffer(std::move(other.buffer)) {
    86	}
    87	
    88	void Vector::CheckCapacity(idx_t capacity) const {
    89	        if (!buffer) {
    90	                // no buffer - we accept any capacity
    91	                return;
    92	        }
    93	        if (GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR) {
    94	                // constant vectors can fit any
    95	                return;
    96	        }
    97	        idx_t buffer_capacity = buffer->Capacity();
    98	        if (capacity > buffer_capacity) {
    99	                throw InternalException("Vector::CheckCapacity - capacity %d exceeds buffer capacity %d", capacity,
   100	                                        buffer_capacity);
   101	        }
   102	}
   103	
   104	Vector Vector::Ref(const Vector &other) {
   105	        return Vector(other, VectorConstructorAction::REFERENCE_VECTOR);
   106	}
   107	
   108	void Vector::Reference(const Value &value) {
   109	        D_ASSERT(GetType().id() == value.type().id());
   110	        auto internal_type = value.type().InternalType();
   111	        if (internal_type == PhysicalType::STRUCT) {
   112	                auto &child_types = StructType::GetChildTypes(value.type());
   113	                vector<Vector> child_vectors;
   114	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < child_types.size(); i++) {
   115	                        child_vectors.emplace_back(value.IsNull() ? Value(child_types[i].second)
   116	                                                                  : StructValue::GetChildren(value)[i]);
   117	                }
   118	                auto struct_buffer = make_buffer<VectorStructBuffer>(std::move(child_vectors), 1ULL);
   119	                buffer = std::move(struct_buffer);
   120	                if (value.IsNull()) {
   121	                        SetValue(0, value);
   122	                }
   123	        } else if (internal_type == PhysicalType::LIST) {
   124	                buffer = VectorBuffer::CreateConstantVector(value.type());
   125	                SetValue(0, value);
   126	        } else if (internal_type == PhysicalType::ARRAY) {
   127	                buffer = make_buffer<VectorArrayBuffer>(value.type());
   128	                SetValue(0, value);
   129	        } else {
   130	                buffer = VectorBuffer::CreateConstantVector(value.type());
   131	                SetValue(0, value);
   132	        }
   133	        SetVectorType(VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
   134	}
   135	
   136	void Vector::Reference(const Vector &other) {
   137	        if (other.GetType().id() != GetType().id()) {
   138	                throw InternalException("Vector::Reference used on vector of different type (source %s referenced %s)",
   139	                                        GetType(), other.GetType());
   140	        }
   141	        D_ASSERT(other.GetType() == GetType());
   142	        ConstReference(other);
   143	}
   144	
   145	void Vector::ReferenceAndSetType(const Vector &other) {
   146	        type = other.GetType();
   147	        Reference(other);
   148	}
   149	
   150	void Vector::Reinterpret(const Vector &other) {
   151	        auto &this_type = GetType();
   152	        auto &other_type = other.GetType();
   153	#ifdef DEBUG
   154	        auto type_is_same = other_type == this_type;
   155	        bool this_is_nested = this_type.IsNested();
   156	        bool other_is_nested = other_type.IsNested();
   157	
   158	        bool not_nested = this_is_nested == false && other_is_nested == false;
   159	        bool type_size_equal = GetTypeIdSize(this_type.InternalType()) == GetTypeIdSize(other_type.InternalType());
   160	        //! Either the types are completely identical, or they are not nested and their physical type size is the same
   161	        //! The reason nested types are not allowed is because copying the auxiliary buffer does not happen recursively
   162	        //! e.g DOUBLE[] to BIGINT[], the type of the LIST would say BIGINT but the child Vector says DOUBLE
   163	        D_ASSERT((not_nested && type_size_equal) || type_is_same);
   164	#endif
   165	        ConstReference(other);
   166	        if (GetVectorType() == VectorType::DICTIONARY_VECTOR && other_type != this_type) {
   167	                Vector new_vector(this_type, nullptr);
   168	                new_vector.Reinterpret(DictionaryVector::Child(other));
   169	                auto &old_dict = buffer->Cast<DictionaryBuffer>();
   170	                auto new_entry = make_shared_ptr<DictionaryEntry>(std::move(new_vector));
   171	                buffer = make_buffer<DictionaryBuffer>(old_dict.GetSelVector(), old_dict.Capacity(), std::move(new_entry));
   172	                auto dict_size = old_dict.GetDictionarySize();
   173	                if (dict_size.IsValid()) {
   174	                        buffer->Cast<DictionaryBuffer>().SetDictionarySize(dict_size.GetIndex());
   175	                }
   176	                buffer->Cast<DictionaryBuffer>().SetDictionaryId(old_dict.GetDictionaryId());
   177	        }
   178	}
   179	
   180	void Vector::ConstReference(const Vector &other) const {
   181	        AssignSharedPointer(buffer, other.buffer);
   182	}
   183	
   184	void Vector::ResetFromCache(const VectorCache &cache) {
   185	        cache.ResetFromCache(*this);
   186	}
   187	
   188	void Vector::Slice(const Vector &other, idx_t offset, idx_t end) {
   189	        buffer = other.buffer->Slice(GetType(), offset, end);
   190	        if (!buffer) {
   191	                buffer = other.buffer;
   192	        }
   193	}
   194	
   195	void Vector::Slice(const Vector &other, const SelectionVector &sel, idx_t count) {
   196	        Reference(other);
   197	        Slice(sel, count);
   198	}
   199	
   200	void Vector::Slice(const SelectionVector &sel, idx_t count) {
   201	        if (!sel.IsSet() || count == 0) {
   202	                return;
   203	        }
   204	        auto new_buffer = buffer->Slice(GetType(), sel, count);
   205	        if (new_buffer) {
   206	                buffer = std::move(new_buffer);
   207	        }
   208	}
   209	
   210	void Vector::Slice(const SelectionVector &sel, idx_t count, SelCache &cache) {
   211	        if (!sel.IsSet() || count == 0) {
   212	                return;
   213	        }
   214	        auto new_buffer = buffer->SliceWithCache(cache, GetType(), sel, count);
   215	        if (new_buffer) {
   216	                buffer = std::move(new_buffer);
   217	        }
   218	}
   219	
   220	void Vector::Dictionary(idx_t dictionary_size, const SelectionVector &sel, idx_t count) {
   221	        Slice(sel, count);
   222	        if (GetVectorType() == VectorType::DICTIONARY_VECTOR) {
   223	                buffer->Cast<DictionaryBuffer>().SetDictionarySize(dictionary_size);
   224	        }
   225	}
   226	
   227	void Vector::Dictionary(const Vector &dict, idx_t dictionary_size, const SelectionVector &sel, idx_t count) {
   228	        Reference(dict);
   229	        Dictionary(dictionary_size, sel, count);
   230	}
   231	
   232	void Vector::Dictionary(buffer_ptr<DictionaryEntry> reusable_dict, const SelectionVector &sel, idx_t sel_count) {
   233	        if (type.InternalType() == PhysicalType::STRUCT) {
   234	                throw InternalException("Struct vectors cannot be dictionaries");
   235	        }
   236	        D_ASSERT(type == reusable_dict->data.GetType());
   237	        buffer = make_buffer<DictionaryBuffer>(sel, sel_count, std::move(reusable_dict));
   238	}
   239	
   240	void Vector::Initialize(VectorDataInitialization data_initialize, idx_t capacity) {
   241	        auto &type = GetType();
   242	        auto internal_type = type.InternalType();
   243	        if (internal_type == PhysicalType::STRUCT) {
   244	                buffer = make_buffer<VectorStructBuffer>(type, capacity);
   245	        } else if (internal_type == PhysicalType::LIST) {
   246	                buffer = make_buffer<VectorListBuffer>(capacity, type);
   247	                if (data_initialize == VectorDataInitialization::ZERO_INITIALIZE) {
   248	                        auto data = buffer->GetData();
   249	                        memset(data, 0, capacity * sizeof(list_entry_t));
   250	                }
   251	        } else if (internal_type == PhysicalType::ARRAY) {
   252	                buffer = make_buffer<VectorArrayBuffer>(type, capacity);
   253	        } else {
   254	                auto type_size = GetTypeIdSize(internal_type);
   255	                if (type_size == 0) {
   256	                        throw InternalException("Trying to create buffer for zero-length type");
   257	                }
   258	                buffer = VectorBuffer::CreateStandardVector(type, capacity);
   259	                if (data_initialize == VectorDataInitialization::ZERO_INITIALIZE) {
   260	                        auto data = buffer->GetData();
   261	                        memset(data, 0, capacity * type_size);
   262	                }
   263	        }
   264	}
   265	
   266	void Vector::AddAuxiliaryData(unique_ptr<AuxiliaryDataHolder> data) {
   267	        buffer->AddAuxiliaryData(std::move(data));
   268	}
   269	
   270	void Vector::AddHeapReference(const Vector &other) {
   271	        if (other.GetVectorType() == VectorType::DICTIONARY_VECTOR) {
   272	                AddHeapReference(DictionaryVector::Child(other));
   273	                return;
   274	        }
   275	        auto &auxiliary_data = other.buffer->GetAuxiliaryData();
   276	        if (!auxiliary_data) {
   277	                return;
   278	        }
   279	        AddAuxiliaryData(make_uniq<AuxiliaryDataSetHolder>(auxiliary_data));
   280	}
   281	
   282	void Vector::Resize(idx_t current_size, idx_t new_size) {
   283	        if (!buffer) {
   284	                // The vector does not contain any data - initialize
   285	                if (current_size != 0) {
   286	                        throw InternalException("Vector::Resize - buffer does not contain any data but current_size is not 0");
   287	                }
   288	                Initialize(VectorDataInitialization::UNINITIALIZED, new_size);
   289	        } else {
   290	                // resize the buffer
   291	                auto new_buffer = buffer->Resize(GetType(), current_size, new_size);
   292	                if (new_buffer) {
   293	                        buffer = std::move(new_buffer);
   294	                }
   295	        }
   296	}
   297	
   298	void Vector::SetValue(idx_t index, const Value &val) {
   299	        buffer->SetValue(GetType(), index, val);
   300	}
   301	
   302	Value Vector::GetValueInternal(const Vector &v_p, idx_t index_p) {
   303	        return v_p.buffer->GetValue(v_p.GetType(), index_p);
   304	}
   305	
   306	Value Vector::GetValue(const Vector &v_p, idx_t index_p) {
   307	        auto value = GetValueInternal(v_p, index_p);
   308	        // set the alias of the type to the correct value, if there is a type alias
   309	        if (v_p.GetType().HasAlias()) {
   310	                value.GetTypeMutable().CopyAuxInfo(v_p.GetType());
   311	        }
   312	        if (v_p.GetType().id() != LogicalTypeId::LEGACY_AGGREGATE_STATE &&
   313	            value.type().id() != LogicalTypeId::LEGACY_AGGREGATE_STATE) {
   314	                D_ASSERT(v_p.GetType() == value.type());
   315	        }
   316	        return value;
   317	}
   318	
   319	Value Vector::GetValue(idx_t index) const {
   320	        return GetValue(*this, index);
   321	}
   322	
   323	// LCOV_EXCL_START
   324	string VectorTypeToString(VectorType type) {
   325	        switch (type) {
   326	        case VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR:
   327	                return "FLAT";
   328	        case VectorType::FSST_VECTOR:
   329	                return "FSST";
   330	        case VectorType::SEQUENCE_VECTOR:
   331	                return "SEQUENCE";
   332	        case VectorType::DICTIONARY_VECTOR:
   333	                return "DICTIONARY";
   334	        case VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR:
   335	                return "CONSTANT";
   336	        case VectorType::SHREDDED_VECTOR:
   337	                return "SHREDDED";
   338	        default:
   339	                return "UNKNOWN";
   340	        }
   341	}
   342	
   343	string Vector::ToString(idx_t count) const {
   344	        string retval =
   345	            VectorTypeToString(GetVectorType()) + " " + GetType().ToString() + ": " + to_string(count) + " = [ ";
   346	        retval += Buffer().ToString(GetType(), count);
   347	        retval += "]";
   348	        return retval;
   349	}
   350	
   351	void Vector::Print(idx_t count) const {
   352	        Printer::Print(ToString(count));
   353	}
   354	
   355	idx_t Vector::GetDataSize(idx_t cardinality) const {
   356	        return Buffer().GetDataSize(type, cardinality);
   357	}
   358	
   359	idx_t Vector::GetAllocationSize(idx_t cardinality) const {
   360	        return GetDataSize(cardinality);
   361	}
   362	
   363	idx_t Vector::GetAllocationSize() const {
   364	        if (!buffer) {
   365	                return 0;
   366	        }
   367	        return Buffer().GetAllocationSize();
   368	}

   370	string Vector::ToString() const {
   371	        string retval = VectorTypeToString(GetVectorType()) + " " + GetType().ToString() + ": (UNKNOWN COUNT) [ ";
   372	        retval += Buffer().ToString(GetType());
   373	        retval += "]";
   374	        return retval;
   375	}

   378	        Printer::Print(ToString());
   379	}
   380	// LCOV_EXCL_STOP
   381	
   382	void Vector::Flatten(idx_t count) const {
   383	        Flatten(*FlatVector::IncrementalSelectionVector(), count);
   384	}
   385	
   386	void Vector::Flatten(const SelectionVector &sel, idx_t count) const {
   387	        auto new_buffer = Buffer().Flatten(GetType(), sel, count);
   388	        if (new_buffer) {
   389	                buffer = std::move(new_buffer);
   390	        }
   391	}
   392	
   393	void Vector::ToUnifiedFormat(idx_t count, UnifiedVectorFormat &format) const {
   394	        format.physical_type = GetType().InternalType();
   395	        auto vtype = GetVectorType();
   396	        if (vtype != VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR && vtype != VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR &&
   397	            vtype != VectorType::DICTIONARY_VECTOR) {
   398	                // FSST/SEQUENCE/SHREDDED: flatten first so the buffer can provide unified format
   399	                Flatten(count);
   400	        }
   401	        Buffer().ToUnifiedFormat(count, format);
   402	}
   403	
   404	void Vector::RecursiveToUnifiedFormat(const Vector &input, idx_t count, RecursiveUnifiedVectorFormat &data) {
   405	        input.ToUnifiedFormat(count, data.unified);
   406	        data.logical_type = input.GetType();
   407	
   408	        if (input.GetType().InternalType() == PhysicalType::LIST) {
   409	                auto &child = ListVector::GetEntry(input);
   410	                auto child_count = ListVector::GetListSize(input);
   411	                data.children.emplace_back();
   412	                Vector::RecursiveToUnifiedFormat(child, child_count, data.children.back());
   413	
   414	        } else if (input.GetType().InternalType() == PhysicalType::ARRAY) {
   415	                auto &child = ArrayVector::GetEntry(input);
   416	                auto array_size = ArrayType::GetSize(input.GetType());
   417	                auto child_count = count * array_size;
   418	                data.children.emplace_back();
   419	                Vector::RecursiveToUnifiedFormat(child, child_count, data.children.back());
   420	
   421	        } else if (input.GetType().InternalType() == PhysicalType::STRUCT) {
   422	                auto &children = StructVector::GetEntries(input);
   423	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < children.size(); i++) {
   424	                        data.children.emplace_back();
   425	                }
   426	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < children.size(); i++) {
   427	                        Vector::RecursiveToUnifiedFormat(children[i], count, data.children[i]);
   428	                }
   429	        }
   430	}
   431	
   432	void Vector::Sequence(int64_t start, int64_t increment, idx_t count) {
   433	        this->buffer = make_buffer<SequenceBuffer>(start, increment, static_cast<int64_t>(count));
   434	}
   435	
   436	void Vector::Shred(Vector &shredded_data, idx_t capacity) {
   437	        if (GetType().id() != LogicalTypeId::VARIANT) {
   438	                throw InternalException("Vector::Shred can only be used on variant vectors");
   439	        }
   440	        auto &shredded_type = shredded_data.GetType();
   441	        if (shredded_type.id() != LogicalTypeId::STRUCT || StructType::GetChildCount(shredded_type) != 2) {
   442	                throw InternalException("Vector::Shred parameter must be a struct with two children");
   443	        }
   444	        this->buffer = make_buffer<ShreddedVectorBuffer>(shredded_data, capacity);
   445	}
   446

   857	void Vector::DebugTransformToDictionary(Vector &vector, idx_t count) {
   858	        if (vector.GetVectorType() != VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR) {
   859	                // only supported for flat vectors currently
   860	                return;
   861	        }
   862	        // convert vector to dictionary vector
   863	        // first create an inverted vector of twice the size with NULL values every other value
   864	        // i.e. [1, 2, 3] is converted into [NULL, 3, NULL, 2, NULL, 1]
   865	        idx_t verify_count = count * 2;
   866	        SelectionVector inverted_sel(verify_count);
   867	        idx_t offset = 0;
   868	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   869	                idx_t current_index = count - i - 1;
   870	                inverted_sel.set_index(offset++, current_index);

    25	
    26	MapInvalidReason MapVector::CheckMapValidity(Vector &map, idx_t count, const SelectionVector &sel) {
    27	        D_ASSERT(map.GetType().id() == LogicalTypeId::MAP);
    28	
    29	        // unify the MAP vector, which is a physical LIST vector
    30	        auto map_entries = map.Values<list_entry_t>(count);
    31	        auto maps_length = ListVector::GetListSize(map);
    32	
    33	        // unify the child vector containing the keys
    34	        auto &keys = MapVector::GetKeys(map);
    35	
    36	        auto key_validity = keys.Validity(maps_length);
    37	        for (idx_t row_idx = 0; row_idx < count; row_idx++) {
    38	                auto mapped_row = sel.get_index(row_idx);
    39	                auto map_entry = map_entries[mapped_row];
    40	                if (!map_entry.IsValid()) {
    41	                        continue;
    42	                }
    43	                auto &map_list = map_entry.GetValue();
    44	
    45	                value_set_t unique_keys;
    46	                auto length = map_list.length;
    47	                auto offset = map_list.offset;
    48	
    49	                for (idx_t child_idx = 0; child_idx < length; child_idx++) {
    50	                        if (!key_validity.IsValid(offset + child_idx)) {
    51	                                return MapInvalidReason::NULL_KEY;
    52	                        }
    53	
    54	                        auto value = keys.GetValue(offset + child_idx);
    55	                        auto unique = unique_keys.insert(value).second;
    56	                        if (!unique) {
    57	                                return MapInvalidReason::DUPLICATE_KEY;
    58	                        }
    59	                }
    60	        }
    61	
    62	        return MapInvalidReason::VALID;
    63	}
    64	
    65	void MapVector::MapConversionVerify(Vector &vector, idx_t count) {
    66	        auto reason = MapVector::CheckMapValidity(vector, count);
    67	        EvalMapInvalidReason(reason);
    68	}
    69	
    70	void MapVector::EvalMapInvalidReason(MapInvalidReason reason) {
    71	        switch (reason) {
    72	        case MapInvalidReason::VALID:
    73	                return;
    74	        case MapInvalidReason::DUPLICATE_KEY:
    75	                throw InvalidInputException("Map keys must be unique.");
    76	        case MapInvalidReason::NULL_KEY:
    77	                throw InvalidInputException("Map keys can not be NULL.");
    78	        case MapInvalidReason::NOT_ALIGNED:
    79	                throw InvalidInputException("The map key list does not align with the map value list.");
    80	        case MapInvalidReason::INVALID_PARAMS:
    81	                throw InvalidInputException("Invalid map argument(s). Valid map arguments are a list of key-value pairs (MAP "
    82	                                            "{'key1': 'val1', ...}), two lists (MAP ([1, 2], [10, 11])), or no arguments.");
    83	        default:
    84	                throw InternalException("MapInvalidReason not implemented");
    85	        }
    86	}
    87	
    88	} // namespace duckdb

    39	    : StandardVectorBuffer(std::move(allocated_data_p), capacity), size(parent.size) {
    40	        buffer_type = VectorBufferType::LIST_BUFFER;
    41	        auto &parent_child = parent.GetChildMutable();
    42	        child = std::move(parent_child);
    43	        parent_child = make_uniq<Vector>(Vector::Ref(*child));

    45	
    46	void VectorListBuffer::Reserve(idx_t to_reserve) {
    47	        idx_t child_capacity = GetChildCapacity();
    48	        if (to_reserve > child_capacity) {
    49	                if (to_reserve > DConstants::MAX_VECTOR_SIZE) {
    50	                        // overflow: throw an exception
    51	                        throw OutOfRangeException("Cannot resize vector to %d rows: maximum allowed vector size is %s", to_reserve,
    52	                                                  StringUtil::BytesToHumanReadableString(DConstants::MAX_VECTOR_SIZE));
    53	                }
    54	                idx_t new_capacity = NextPowerOfTwo(to_reserve);
    55	                D_ASSERT(new_capacity >= to_reserve);
    56	                child->Resize(child_capacity, new_capacity);
    57	        }
    58	}
    59	
    60	void VectorListBuffer::Append(const Vector &to_append, idx_t to_append_size, idx_t source_offset) {
    61	        Reserve(size + to_append_size - source_offset);
    62	        VectorOperations::Copy(to_append, *child, to_append_size, source_offset, size);
    63	        size += to_append_size - source_offset;
    64	}
    65	
    66	void VectorListBuffer::Append(const Vector &to_append, const SelectionVector &sel, idx_t to_append_size,
    67	                              idx_t source_offset) {
    68	        Reserve(size + to_append_size - source_offset);
    69	        VectorOperations::Copy(to_append, *child, sel, to_append_size, source_offset, size);
    70	        size += to_append_size - source_offset;
    71	}
    72	
    73	void VectorListBuffer::PushBack(const Value &insert) {
    74	        auto child_capacity = GetChildCapacity();
    75	        while (size + 1 > child_capacity) {
    76	                child->Resize(child_capacity, child_capacity * 2);
    77	                child_capacity *= 2;
    78	        }
    79	        child->SetValue(size++, insert);
    80	}
    81	
    82	idx_t VectorListBuffer::GetChildCapacity() const {
    83	        return FlatVector::GetCapacity(*child);
    84	}
    85	
    86	void VectorListBuffer::SetSize(idx_t new_size) {
    87	        this->size = new_size;
    88	}
    89	
    90	VectorListBuffer::~VectorListBuffer() {
    91	}
    92	
    93	idx_t VectorListBuffer::GetDataSize(const LogicalType &type, idx_t count) const {
    94	        idx_t size = StandardVectorBuffer::GetDataSize(type, count);
    95	        size += child->GetDataSize(this->size);
    96	        return size;
    97	}
    98	
    99	idx_t VectorListBuffer::GetAllocationSize() const {
   100	        idx_t size = StandardVectorBuffer::GetAllocationSize();
   101	        size += GetChild().GetAllocationSize();
   102	        return size;
   103	}
   104	
   105	void VectorListBuffer::Verify(const LogicalType &type, const SelectionVector &sel, idx_t count) const {
   106	        if (count == 0) {
   107	                return;
   108	        }
   109	        D_ASSERT(type.InternalType() == PhysicalType::LIST);
   110	        D_ASSERT(vector_type == VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR || vector_type == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
   111	        if (type.id() == LogicalTypeId::MAP) {
   112	                // FIXME: verify map
   113	                // auto &child = ListType::GetChildType(vector_p.GetType());
   114	                // D_ASSERT(StructType::GetChildCount(child) == 2);
   115	                // D_ASSERT(StructType::GetChildName(child, 0) == "key");
   116	                // D_ASSERT(StructType::GetChildName(child, 1) == "value");
   117	                //
   118	                // auto valid_check = MapVector::CheckMapValidity(vector_p, count, sel_p);
   119	                // D_ASSERT(valid_check == MapInvalidReason::VALID);
   120	        }
   121	        if (vector_type == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR) {
   122	                count = 1;
   123	        }
   124	        // NOTE: size > capacity can occur in valid intermediate states (e.g. after SetListSize before Reserve)
   125	        // D_ASSERT(size <= capacity);
   126	        idx_t total_size = 0;
   127	        auto child_size = GetSize();
   128	        auto list_data = reinterpret_cast<list_entry_t *>(data_ptr);
   129	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   130	                auto idx = sel.get_index(i);
   131	                idx = vector_type == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR ? 0 : idx;
   132	                auto &le = list_data[idx];
   133	                if (validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   134	                        D_ASSERT(le.offset + le.length <= child_size);
   135	                        total_size += le.length;
   136	                }
   137	        }
   138	        SelectionVector child_sel(total_size);
   139	        idx_t child_count = 0;
   140	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   141	                auto idx = sel.get_index(i);
   142	                idx = vector_type == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR ? 0 : idx;
   143	                auto &le = list_data[idx];
   144	                if (validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   145	                        D_ASSERT(le.offset + le.length <= child_size);
   146	                        for (idx_t k = 0; k < le.length; k++) {
   147	                                child_sel.set_index(child_count++, le.offset + k);
   148	                        }
   149	                }
   150	        }
   151	        child->Verify(child_sel, child_count);
   152	}
   153	
   154	buffer_ptr<VectorBuffer> VectorListBuffer::SliceInternal(const LogicalType &type, idx_t offset, idx_t end) {
   155	        auto type_size = GetTypeIdSize(type.InternalType());
   156	        auto offset_ptr = data_ptr + type_size * offset;
   157	        auto result = make_buffer<VectorListBuffer>(offset_ptr, end - offset, *this);
   158	        result->GetValidityMask().Slice(validity, offset, end - offset);
   159	        return result;
   160	}
   161	
   162	void VectorListBuffer::ToUnifiedFormat(idx_t count, UnifiedVectorFormat &format) const {
   163	        if (vector_type == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR) {
   164	                format.sel = ConstantVector::ZeroSelectionVector(count, format.owned_sel);
   165	        } else {
   166	                format.sel = FlatVector::IncrementalSelectionVector();
   167	        }
   168	        format.data = data_ptr;
   169	        format.validity = validity;
   170	}
   171	
   172	buffer_ptr<VectorBuffer> VectorListBuffer::CreateBuffer(AllocatedData &&new_data, idx_t capacity) const {
   173	        return make_buffer<VectorListBuffer>(std::move(new_data), capacity, *this);
   174	}
   175	
   176	buffer_ptr<VectorBuffer> VectorListBuffer::CreateResizeBuffer(AllocatedData &&new_data, idx_t capacity) {
   177	        return make_buffer<VectorListBuffer>(std::move(new_data), capacity, *this);
   178	}
   179	
   180	buffer_ptr<VectorBuffer> VectorListBuffer::Flatten(const LogicalType &type, const SelectionVector &sel,
   181	                                                   idx_t count) const {
   182	        auto result = StandardVectorBuffer::Flatten(type, sel, count);
   183	        if (!result) {
   184	                // already flat - flatten the child
   185	                auto &child = GetChild();
   186	                child.Flatten(size);
   187	                return nullptr;
   188	        }
   189	        // created a new buffer - also flatten the child
   190	        auto &list_result = result->Cast<VectorListBuffer>();
   191	        list_result.GetChild().Flatten(list_result.size);
   192	        return result;
   193	}
   194	
   195	void VectorListBuffer::SetValue(const LogicalType &type, idx_t index, const Value &val) {
   196	        if (!val.IsNull() && val.type() != type) {
   197	                SetValue(type, index, val.DefaultCastAs(type));
   198	                return;
   199	        }
   200	        validity.Set(index, !val.IsNull());
   201	        auto offset = size;
   202	        if (val.IsNull()) {
   203	                PushBack(Value());
   204	                auto &entry = reinterpret_cast<list_entry_t *>(data_ptr)[index];
   205	                entry.length = 1;
   206	                entry.offset = offset;
   207	        } else {
   208	                auto &val_children = ListValue::GetChildren(val);
   209	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < val_children.size(); i++) {
   210	                        PushBack(val_children[i]);
   211	                }
   212	                auto &entry = reinterpret_cast<list_entry_t *>(data_ptr)[index];
   213	                entry.length = val_children.size();
   214	                entry.offset = offset;
   215	        }
   216	}
   217	
   218	Value VectorListBuffer::GetValue(const LogicalType &type, idx_t index) const {
   219	        if (vector_type == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR) {
   220	                index = 0;
   221	        }
   222	        if (!validity.RowIsValid(index)) {
   223	                return Value(type);
   224	        }
   225	        auto offlen = reinterpret_cast<const list_entry_t *>(data_ptr)[index];
   226	        duckdb::vector<Value> children;
   227	        for (idx_t i = offlen.offset; i < offlen.offset + offlen.length; i++) {
   228	                children.push_back(child->GetValue(i));
   229	        }
   230	        if (type.id() == LogicalTypeId::MAP) {
   231	                return Value::MAP(ListType::GetChildType(type), std::move(children));
   232	        }
   233	        return Value::LIST(ListType::GetChildType(type), std::move(children));
   234	}
   235	
   236	template <class T>
   237	T &ListVector::GetEntryInternal(T &vector) {
   238	        D_ASSERT(vector.GetType().id() == LogicalTypeId::LIST || vector.GetType().id() == LogicalTypeId::MAP);
   239	        if (vector.GetVectorType() == VectorType::DICTIONARY_VECTOR) {
   240	                auto &child = DictionaryVector::Child(vector);
   241	                return ListVector::GetEntry(child);
   242	        }
   243	        D_ASSERT(vector.GetVectorType() == VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR ||
   244	                 vector.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
   245	        D_ASSERT(vector.GetBufferRef());
   246	        D_ASSERT(vector.Buffer().GetBufferType() == VectorBufferType::LIST_BUFFER);
   247	        return vector.GetBufferRef()->template Cast<VectorListBuffer>().GetChild();
   248	}
   249	
   250	const Vector &ListVector::GetEntry(const Vector &vector) {
   251	        return GetEntryInternal<const Vector>(vector);
   252	}
   253	
   254	Vector &ListVector::GetEntry(Vector &vector) {
   255	        return GetEntryInternal<Vector>(vector);
   256	}
   257	
   258	void ListVector::Reserve(Vector &vector, idx_t required_capacity) {
   259	        D_ASSERT(vector.GetType().id() == LogicalTypeId::LIST || vector.GetType().id() == LogicalTypeId::MAP);
   260	        D_ASSERT(vector.GetVectorType() == VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR ||
   261	                 vector.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
   262	        D_ASSERT(vector.GetBufferRef());
   263	        D_ASSERT(vector.Buffer().GetBufferType() == VectorBufferType::LIST_BUFFER);
   264	        auto &child_buffer = vector.BufferMutable().Cast<VectorListBuffer>();
   265	        child_buffer.Reserve(required_capacity);
   266	}
   267	
   268	idx_t ListVector::GetListSize(const Vector &vec) {
   269	        if (vec.GetVectorType() == VectorType::DICTIONARY_VECTOR) {
   270	                auto &child = DictionaryVector::Child(vec);
   271	                return ListVector::GetListSize(child);
   272	        }
   273	        D_ASSERT(vec.GetBufferRef());
   274	        return vec.Buffer().Cast<VectorListBuffer>().GetSize();
   275	}
   276	
   277	idx_t ListVector::GetListCapacity(const Vector &vec) {
   278	        if (vec.GetVectorType() == VectorType::DICTIONARY_VECTOR) {
   279	                throw InternalException("ListVector::GetListCapacity called on dictionary vector");
   280	        }
   281	        D_ASSERT(vec.GetBufferRef());
   282	        return vec.Buffer().Cast<VectorListBuffer>().GetChildCapacity();
   283	}
   284	
   285	void ListVector::SetListSize(Vector &vec, idx_t size) {
   286	        if (vec.GetVectorType() == VectorType::DICTIONARY_VECTOR) {
   287	                throw InternalException("ListVector::SetListSize called on dictionary vector");
   288	        }
   289	        vec.BufferMutable().Cast<VectorListBuffer>().SetSize(size);
   290	}
   291	
   292	void ListVector::Append(Vector &target, const Vector &source, idx_t source_size, idx_t source_offset) {
   293	        if (source_size - source_offset == 0) {
   294	                //! Nothing to add
   295	                return;
   296	        }
   297	        auto &target_buffer = target.BufferMutable().Cast<VectorListBuffer>();
   298	        target_buffer.Append(source, source_size, source_offset);
   299	}
   300	
   301	void ListVector::Append(Vector &target, const Vector &source, const SelectionVector &sel, idx_t source_size,
   302	                        idx_t source_offset) {
   303	        if (source_size - source_offset == 0) {
   304	                //! Nothing to add
   305	                return;
   306	        }
   307	        auto &target_buffer = target.BufferMutable().Cast<VectorListBuffer>();
   308	        target_buffer.Append(source, sel, source_size, source_offset);
   309	}
   310	
   311	void ListVector::PushBack(Vector &target, const Value &insert) {
   312	        auto &target_buffer = target.BufferMutable().Cast<VectorListBuffer>();
   313	        target_buffer.PushBack(insert);
   314	}
   315	
   316	idx_t ListVector::GetConsecutiveChildList(Vector &list, Vector &result, idx_t offset, idx_t count) {
   317	        auto info = ListVector::GetConsecutiveChildListInfo(list, offset, count);
   318	        if (info.needs_slicing) {
   319	                SelectionVector sel(info.child_list_info.length);
   320	                ListVector::GetConsecutiveChildSelVector(list, sel, offset, count);
   321	
   322	                result.Slice(sel, info.child_list_info.length);
   323	                result.Flatten(info.child_list_info.length);
   324	        }
   325	        return info.child_list_info.length;
   326	}
   327	
   328	idx_t ListVector::GetTotalEntryCount(Vector &list, idx_t count) {
   329	        idx_t total_count = 0;
   330	        for (auto entry : list.ValidValues<list_entry_t>(count)) {
   331	                total_count += entry.GetValue().length;
   332	        }
   333	        return total_count;
   334	}
   335	
   336	ConsecutiveChildListInfo ListVector::GetConsecutiveChildListInfo(Vector &list, idx_t offset, idx_t count) {
   337	        ConsecutiveChildListInfo info;
   338	        auto list_data = list.Values<list_entry_t>(offset + count);
   339	
   340	        // find the first non-NULL entry
   341	        idx_t first_length = 0;
   342	        for (idx_t i = offset; i < offset + count; i++) {
   343	                auto entry = list_data[i];
   344	                if (!entry.IsValid()) {
   345	                        continue;
   346	                }
   347	                auto &list_val = entry.GetValue();
   348	                info.child_list_info.offset = list_val.offset;
   349	                first_length = list_val.length;
   350	                break;
   351	        }
   352	
   353	        // small performance improvement for constant vectors
   354	        // avoids iterating over all their (constant) elements
   355	        if (list.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR) {
   356	                info.child_list_info.length = first_length;
   357	                return info;
   358	        }
   359	
   360	        // now get the child count and determine whether the children are stored consecutively
   361	        // also determine if a flat vector has pseudo constant values (all offsets + length the same)
   362	        // this can happen e.g. for UNNESTs
   363	        bool is_consecutive = true;
   364	        for (idx_t i = offset; i < offset + count; i++) {
   365	                auto entry = list_data[i];
   366	                if (!entry.IsValid()) {
   367	                        continue;
   368	                }
   369	                auto &list_val = entry.GetValue();
   370	                if (list_val.offset != info.child_list_info.offset || list_val.length != first_length) {
   371	                        info.is_constant = false;
   372	                }
   373	                if (list_val.offset != info.child_list_info.offset + info.child_list_info.length) {
   374	                        is_consecutive = false;
   375	                }
   376	                info.child_list_info.length += list_val.length;
   377	        }
   378	
   379	        if (info.is_constant) {
   380	                info.child_list_info.length = first_length;
   381	        }
   382	        if (!info.is_constant && !is_consecutive) {
   383	                info.needs_slicing = true;
   384	        }
   385	
   386	        return info;
   387	}
   388	
   389	void ListVector::GetConsecutiveChildSelVector(Vector &list, SelectionVector &sel, idx_t offset, idx_t count) {
   390	        auto list_data = list.Values<list_entry_t>(offset + count);
   391	
   392	        //      SelectionVector child_sel(info.second.length);
   393	        idx_t entry = 0;
   394	        for (idx_t i = offset; i < offset + count; i++) {
   395	                auto list_entry = list_data[i];
   396	                if (!list_entry.IsValid()) {
   397	                        continue;
   398	                }
   399	                auto &list_val = list_entry.GetValue();
   400	                for (idx_t k = 0; k < list_val.length; k++) {
   401	                        //                      child_sel.set_index(entry++, list_data[idx].offset + k);
   402	                        sel.set_index(entry++, list_val.offset + k);
   403	                }
   404	        }
   405	        //
   406	        //      result.Slice(child_sel, info.second.length);
   407	        //      result.Flatten(info.second.length);
   408	        //      info.second.offset = 0;
   409	}
   410	
   411	} // namespace duckdb

    12	unique_ptr<BoundCastData> MapBoundCastData::BindMapToMapCast(BindCastInput &input, const LogicalType &source,
    13	                                                             const LogicalType &target) {
    14	        vector<BoundCastInfo> child_cast_info;
    15	        auto source_key = MapType::KeyType(source);
    16	        auto target_key = MapType::KeyType(target);
    17	        auto source_val = MapType::ValueType(source);
    18	        auto target_val = MapType::ValueType(target);
    19	        auto key_cast = input.GetCastFunction(source_key, target_key);
    20	        auto value_cast = input.GetCastFunction(source_val, target_val);
    21	        return make_uniq<MapBoundCastData>(std::move(key_cast), std::move(value_cast));
    22	}

    24	static bool MapToVarcharCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    25	        auto constant = source.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR;
    26	        auto varchar_type = LogicalType::MAP(LogicalType::VARCHAR, LogicalType::VARCHAR);
    27	        Vector varchar_map(varchar_type, count);
    28	
    29	        // since map's physical type is a list, the ListCast can be utilized
    30	        ListCast::ListToListCast(source, varchar_map, count, parameters);
    31	
    32	        varchar_map.Flatten(count);
    33	        auto &validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(varchar_map);
    34	        auto &key_str = MapVector::GetKeys(varchar_map);
    35	        auto &val_str = MapVector::GetValues(varchar_map);
    36	
    37	        key_str.Flatten(ListVector::GetListSize(source));
    38	        val_str.Flatten(ListVector::GetListSize(source));
    39	
    40	        auto list_data = FlatVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(varchar_map);
    41	        auto key_data = FlatVector::GetData<string_t>(key_str);
    42	        auto val_data = FlatVector::GetData<string_t>(val_str);
    43	        auto &key_validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(key_str);
    44	        auto &val_validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(val_str);
    45	        auto &struct_validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(ListVector::GetEntry(varchar_map));
    46	
    47	        //! {key=value[, ]}
    48	        static constexpr const idx_t SEP_LENGTH = 2;
    49	        static constexpr const idx_t KEY_VALUE_SEP_LENGTH = 1;
    50	        static constexpr const idx_t NULL_LENGTH = 4;
    51	        static constexpr const idx_t INVALID_LENGTH = 7;
    52	
    53	        auto &key_vec = MapVector::GetKeys(source);
    54	        auto &value_vec = MapVector::GetValues(source);
    55	
    56	        auto key_is_nested = key_vec.GetType().IsNested();
    57	        auto value_is_nested = value_vec.GetType().IsNested();
    58	
    59	        auto key_strlen_func = key_is_nested ? VectorCastHelpers::CalculateStringLength
    60	                                             : VectorCastHelpers::CalculateEscapedStringLength<false>;
    61	        auto key_write_func = key_is_nested ? VectorCastHelpers::WriteString : VectorCastHelpers::WriteEscapedString<false>;
    62	
    63	        auto value_strlen_func = value_is_nested ? VectorCastHelpers::CalculateStringLength
    64	                                                 : VectorCastHelpers::CalculateEscapedStringLength<false>;
    65	        auto value_write_func =
    66	            value_is_nested ? VectorCastHelpers::WriteString : VectorCastHelpers::WriteEscapedString<false>;
    67	
    68	        auto result_data = FlatVector::Writer<string_t>(result, count);
    69	        unsafe_unique_array<bool> key_needs_quotes;
    70	        unsafe_unique_array<bool> value_needs_quotes;
    71	        idx_t needs_quotes_length = DConstants::INVALID_INDEX;
    72	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    73	                if (!validity.RowIsValid(i)) {
    74	                        result_data.SetInvalid(i);
    75	                        continue;
    76	                }
    77	
    78	                idx_t string_length = 2; // {}
    79	                auto list = list_data[i];
    80	
    81	                if (!key_needs_quotes || list.length > needs_quotes_length) {
    82	                        key_needs_quotes = make_unsafe_uniq_array_uninitialized<bool>(list.length);
    83	                        value_needs_quotes = make_unsafe_uniq_array_uninitialized<bool>(list.length);
    84	                        needs_quotes_length = list.length;
    85	                }
    86	                for (idx_t list_idx = 0; list_idx < list.length; list_idx++) {
    87	                        if (list_idx > 0) {
    88	                                string_length += SEP_LENGTH;
    89	                        }
    90	
    91	                        auto idx = list.offset + list_idx;
    92	
    93	                        if (!struct_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
    94	                                string_length += NULL_LENGTH;
    95	                                continue;
    96	                        }
    97	                        if (!key_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
    98	                                // throw InternalException("Error in map: key validity invalid?!");
    99	                                string_length += INVALID_LENGTH;
   100	                                continue;
   101	                        }
   102	                        string_length += key_strlen_func(key_data[idx], key_needs_quotes[list_idx]);
   103	                        string_length += KEY_VALUE_SEP_LENGTH;
   104	                        if (val_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   105	                                string_length += value_strlen_func(val_data[idx], value_needs_quotes[list_idx]);
   106	                        } else {
   107	                                string_length += NULL_LENGTH;
   108	                        }
   109	                }
   110	                auto &result_str = result_data[i].EmptyString(string_length);
   111	                auto dataptr = result_str.GetDataWriteable();
   112	                idx_t offset = 0;
   113	
   114	                dataptr[offset++] = '{';
   115	                for (idx_t list_idx = 0; list_idx < list.length; list_idx++) {
   116	                        if (list_idx > 0) {
   117	                                memcpy(dataptr + offset, ", ", SEP_LENGTH);
   118	                                offset += SEP_LENGTH;
   119	                        }
   120	
   121	                        auto idx = list.offset + list_idx;
   122	                        if (!struct_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   123	                                memcpy(dataptr + offset, "NULL", NULL_LENGTH);
   124	                                offset += NULL_LENGTH;
   125	                                continue;
   126	                        }
   127	                        if (!key_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   128	                                // throw InternalException("Error in map: key validity invalid?!");
   129	                                memcpy(dataptr + offset, "invalid", INVALID_LENGTH);
   130	                                offset += INVALID_LENGTH;
   131	                                continue;
   132	                        }
   133	                        offset += key_write_func(dataptr + offset, key_data[idx], key_needs_quotes[list_idx]);
   134	                        dataptr[offset++] = '=';
   135	                        if (val_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   136	                                offset += value_write_func(dataptr + offset, val_data[idx], value_needs_quotes[list_idx]);
   137	                        } else {
   138	                                memcpy(dataptr + offset, "NULL", NULL_LENGTH);
   139	                                offset += NULL_LENGTH;
   140	                        }
   141	                }
   142	                dataptr[offset++] = '}';
   143	                result_str.Finalize();
   144	        }
   145	
   146	        if (constant) {
   147	                result.SetVectorType(VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
   148	        }
   149	        return true;
   150	}
   151	
   152	BoundCastInfo DefaultCasts::MapCastSwitch(BindCastInput &input, const LogicalType &source, const LogicalType &target) {
   153	        switch (target.id()) {
   154	        case LogicalTypeId::MAP:
   155	                return BoundCastInfo(ListCast::ListToListCast, ListBoundCastData::BindListToListCast(input, source, target),
   156	                                     ListBoundCastData::InitListLocalState);
   157	        case LogicalTypeId::VARCHAR: {
   158	                auto varchar_type = LogicalType::MAP(LogicalType::VARCHAR, LogicalType::VARCHAR);
   159	                return BoundCastInfo(MapToVarcharCast, ListBoundCastData::BindListToListCast(input, source, varchar_type),
   160	                                     ListBoundCastData::InitListLocalState);
   161	        }
   162	        default:
   163	                return TryVectorNullCast;
   164	        }
   165	}
   166	
   167	} // namespace duckdb

    14	unique_ptr<BoundCastData> ListBoundCastData::BindListToListCast(BindCastInput &input, const LogicalType &source,
    15	                                                                const LogicalType &target) {
    16	        vector<BoundCastInfo> child_cast_info;
    17	        auto &source_child_type = ListType::GetChildType(source);
    18	        auto &result_child_type = ListType::GetChildType(target);
    19	        auto child_cast = input.GetCastFunction(source_child_type, result_child_type);
    20	        return make_uniq<ListBoundCastData>(std::move(child_cast));
    21	}

    23	static unique_ptr<BoundCastData> BindListToArrayCast(BindCastInput &input, const LogicalType &source,
    24	                                                     const LogicalType &target) {
    25	        vector<BoundCastInfo> child_cast_info;
    26	        auto &source_child_type = ListType::GetChildType(source);
    27	        auto &result_child_type = ArrayType::GetChildType(target);
    28	        auto child_cast = input.GetCastFunction(source_child_type, result_child_type);
    29	        return make_uniq<ListBoundCastData>(std::move(child_cast));
    30	}

    32	unique_ptr<FunctionLocalState> ListBoundCastData::InitListLocalState(CastLocalStateParameters &parameters) {
    33	        auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<ListBoundCastData>();
    34	        if (!cast_data.child_cast_info.HasInitLocalState()) {
    35	                return nullptr;
    36	        }
    37	        CastLocalStateParameters child_parameters(parameters, cast_data.child_cast_info.GetCastData());
    38	        return cast_data.child_cast_info.InitLocalState(child_parameters);
    39	}

    41	bool ListCast::ListToListCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    42	        auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<ListBoundCastData>();
    43	
    44	        // only handle constant and flat vectors here for now
    45	        if (source.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR) {
    46	                result.SetVectorType(source.GetVectorType());
    47	                const bool is_null = ConstantVector::IsNull(source);
    48	                ConstantVector::SetNull(result, is_null);
    49	
    50	                if (!is_null) {
    51	                        auto ldata = ConstantVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(source);
    52	                        auto tdata = ConstantVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(result);
    53	                        *tdata = *ldata;
    54	                }
    55	        } else {
    56	                source.Flatten(count);
    57	                result.SetVectorType(VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR);
    58	                FlatVector::SetValidity(result, FlatVector::ValidityMutable(source));
    59	
    60	                auto ldata = FlatVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(source);
    61	                auto tdata = FlatVector::Writer<list_entry_t>(result, count);
    62	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    63	                        tdata[i] = ldata[i];
    64	                }
    65	        }
    66	        auto &source_cc = ListVector::GetEntry(source);
    67	        auto source_size = ListVector::GetListSize(source);
    68	
    69	        ListVector::Reserve(result, source_size);
    70	        auto &append_vector = ListVector::GetEntry(result);
    71	
    72	        CastParameters child_parameters(parameters, cast_data.child_cast_info.GetCastData(), parameters.local_state);
    73	        bool all_succeeded = cast_data.child_cast_info.Cast(source_cc, append_vector, source_size, child_parameters);
    74	        ListVector::SetListSize(result, source_size);
    75	        D_ASSERT(ListVector::GetListSize(result) == source_size);
    76	        return all_succeeded;
    77	}
    78	
    79	static bool ListToVarcharCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    80	        // first cast the child vector to varchar
    81	        Vector varchar_list(LogicalType::LIST(LogicalType::VARCHAR), count);
    82	        ListCast::ListToListCast(source, varchar_list, count, parameters);
    83	
    84	        auto &child_vec = ListVector::GetEntry(source);
    85	        auto child_is_nested = child_vec.GetType().IsNested();
    86	        auto string_length_func = child_is_nested ? VectorCastHelpers::CalculateStringLength
    87	                                                  : VectorCastHelpers::CalculateEscapedStringLength<false>;
    88	        auto write_string_func =
    89	            child_is_nested ? VectorCastHelpers::WriteString : VectorCastHelpers::WriteEscapedString<false>;
    90	
    91	        // now construct the actual varchar vector
    92	        varchar_list.Flatten(count);
    93	        auto &child = ListVector::GetEntry(varchar_list);
    94	        auto list_data = FlatVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(varchar_list);
    95	        auto &validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(varchar_list);
    96	
    97	        child.Flatten(ListVector::GetListSize(varchar_list));
    98	        auto child_data = FlatVector::GetData<string_t>(child);
    99	        auto &child_validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(child);
   100	
   101	        static constexpr const idx_t SEP_LENGTH = 2;
   102	        static constexpr const idx_t NULL_LENGTH = 4;
   103	        unsafe_unique_array<bool> needs_quotes;
   104	        idx_t needs_quotes_length = DConstants::INVALID_INDEX;
   105	
   106	        auto result_data = FlatVector::Writer<string_t>(result, count);
   107	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   108	                if (!validity.RowIsValid(i)) {
   109	                        result_data.SetInvalid(i);
   110	                        continue;
   111	                }
   112	                auto list = list_data[i];
   113	                // figure out how long the result needs to be
   114	                idx_t list_length = 2; // "[" and "]"
   115	                if (!needs_quotes || list.length > needs_quotes_length) {
   116	                        needs_quotes = make_unsafe_uniq_array_uninitialized<bool>(list.length);
   117	                        needs_quotes_length = list.length;
   118	                }
   119	                for (idx_t list_idx = 0; list_idx < list.length; list_idx++) {
   120	                        auto idx = list.offset + list_idx;
   121	                        if (list_idx > 0) {
   122	                                list_length += SEP_LENGTH; // ", "
   123	                        }
   124	                        // string length, or "NULL"
   125	                        if (child_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   126	                                list_length += string_length_func(child_data[idx], needs_quotes[list_idx]);
   127	                        } else {
   128	                                list_length += NULL_LENGTH;
   129	                        }
   130	                }
   131	                auto &result_str = result_data[i].EmptyString(list_length);
   132	                auto dataptr = result_str.GetDataWriteable();
   133	                idx_t offset = 0;
   134	                dataptr[offset++] = '[';
   135	                for (idx_t list_idx = 0; list_idx < list.length; list_idx++) {
   136	                        auto idx = list.offset + list_idx;
   137	                        if (list_idx > 0) {
   138	                                memcpy(dataptr + offset, ", ", SEP_LENGTH);
   139	                                offset += SEP_LENGTH;
   140	                        }
   141	                        if (child_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   142	                                offset += write_string_func(dataptr + offset, child_data[idx], needs_quotes[list_idx]);
   143	                        } else {
   144	                                memcpy(dataptr + offset, "NULL", NULL_LENGTH);
   145	                                offset += NULL_LENGTH;
   146	                        }
   147	                }
   148	                dataptr[offset] = ']';
   149	                result_str.Finalize();
   150	        }
   151	        return true;
   152	}
   153	
   154	static bool ListToArrayCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
   155	        auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<ListBoundCastData>();
   156	        auto array_size = ArrayType::GetSize(result.GetType());
   157	
   158	        // only handle constant and flat vectors here for now
   159	        if (source.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR) {
   160	                result.SetVectorType(source.GetVectorType());
   161	                if (ConstantVector::IsNull(source)) {
   162	                        ConstantVector::SetNull(result);
   163	                        return true;
   164	                }
   165	
   166	                auto ldata = ConstantVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(source)[0];
   167	                if (!ConstantVector::IsNull(source) && ldata.length != array_size) {
   168	                        // Cant cast to array, list size mismatch
   169	                        auto msg = StringUtil::Format("Cannot cast list with length %llu to array with length %u", ldata.length,
   170	                                                      array_size);
   171	                        HandleCastError::AssignError(msg, parameters);
   172	                        ConstantVector::SetNull(result);
   173	                        return false;
   174	                }
   175	
   176	                auto &source_cc = ListVector::GetEntry(source);
   177	                auto &result_cc = ArrayVector::GetEntry(result);
   178	
   179	                CastParameters child_parameters(parameters, cast_data.child_cast_info.GetCastData(), parameters.local_state);
   180	
   181	                if (ldata.offset == 0) {
   182	                        // Fast path: offset is zero, we can just cast `array_size` elements of the child vectors directly
   183	                        // Since the list was constant, there can only be one sequence of data in the child vector
   184	                        return cast_data.child_cast_info.Cast(source_cc, result_cc, array_size, child_parameters);
   185	                }
   186	
   187	                // Else, we need to copy the range we want to cast to a new vector and cast that
   188	                // In theory we could slice the source child to create a dictionary, but we would then have to flatten the
   189	                // result child which is going to allocate a temp vector and perform a copy anyway. Since we just want to copy a
   190	                // single contiguous range with a single offset, this is simpler.
   191	
   192	                Vector payload_vector(source_cc.GetType(), array_size);
   193	                VectorOperations::Copy(source_cc, payload_vector, ldata.offset + array_size, ldata.offset, 0);
   194	                return cast_data.child_cast_info.Cast(payload_vector, result_cc, array_size, child_parameters);
   195	
   196	        } else {
   197	                source.Flatten(count);
   198	                result.SetVectorType(VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR);
   199	
   200	                auto child_type = ArrayType::GetChildType(result.GetType());
   201	                auto &source_cc = ListVector::GetEntry(source);
   202	                auto &result_cc = ArrayVector::GetEntry(result);
   203	                auto ldata = FlatVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(source);
   204	
   205	                auto child_count = array_size * count;
   206	                SelectionVector child_sel(child_count);
   207	
   208	                bool all_ok = true;
   209	
   210	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   211	                        if (FlatVector::IsNull(source, i)) {
   212	                                FlatVector::SetNull(result, i, true);
   213	                                for (idx_t array_elem = 0; array_elem < array_size; array_elem++) {
   214	                                        FlatVector::SetNull(result_cc, i * array_size + array_elem, true);
   215	                                        child_sel.set_index(i * array_size + array_elem, 0);
   216	                                }
   217	                        } else if (ldata[i].length != array_size) {
   218	                                if (all_ok) {
   219	                                        all_ok = false;
   220	                                        auto msg = StringUtil::Format("Cannot cast list with length %llu to array with length %u",
   221	                                                                      ldata[i].length, array_size);
   222	                                        HandleCastError::AssignError(msg, parameters);
   223	                                }
   224	                                FlatVector::SetNull(result, i, true);
   225	                                for (idx_t array_elem = 0; array_elem < array_size; array_elem++) {
   226	                                        FlatVector::SetNull(result_cc, i * array_size + array_elem, true);
   227	                                        child_sel.set_index(i * array_size + array_elem, 0);
   228	                                }
   229	                        } else {
   230	                                for (idx_t array_elem = 0; array_elem < array_size; array_elem++) {
   231	                                        child_sel.set_index(i * array_size + array_elem, ldata[i].offset + array_elem);
   232	                                }
   233	                        }
   234	                }
   235	
   236	                CastParameters child_parameters(parameters, cast_data.child_cast_info.GetCastData(), parameters.local_state);
   237	
   238	                // Fast path: No lists are null
   239	                // We can just cast the child vector directly
   240	                // Note: Its worth doing a CheckAllValid here, the slow path is significantly more expensive
   241	                if (FlatVector::ValidityMutable(result).CheckAllValid(count)) {
   242	                        Vector payload_vector(result_cc.GetType(), child_count);
   243	
   244	                        bool ok = cast_data.child_cast_info.Cast(source_cc, payload_vector, child_count, child_parameters);
   245	                        if (all_ok && !ok) {
   246	                                all_ok = false;
   247	                                HandleCastError::AssignError(*child_parameters.error_message, parameters);
   248	                        }
   249	                        // Now do the actual copy onto the result vector, making sure to slice properly in case the lists are out of
   250	                        // order
   251	                        VectorOperations::Copy(payload_vector, result_cc, child_sel, child_count, 0, 0);
   252	                        return all_ok;
   253	                }
   254	
   255	                // Slow path: Some lists are null, so we need to copy the data list by list to the right place
   256	                auto list_data = FlatVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(source);
   257	                DataChunk cast_chunk;
   258	                cast_chunk.Initialize(Allocator::DefaultAllocator(), {source_cc.GetType(), result_cc.GetType()}, array_size);
   259	
   260	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   261	                        if (FlatVector::IsNull(result, i)) {
   262	                                // We've already failed to cast this list above (e.g. length mismatch), so theres nothing to do here.
   263	                                continue;
   264	                        } else {
   265	                                auto &list_cast_input = cast_chunk.data[0];
   266	                                auto &list_cast_output = cast_chunk.data[1];
   267	                                auto list_entry = list_data[i];
   268	
   269	                                VectorOperations::Copy(source_cc, list_cast_input, list_entry.offset + array_size, list_entry.offset,
   270	                                                       0);
   271	
   272	                                bool ok =
   273	                                    cast_data.child_cast_info.Cast(list_cast_input, list_cast_output, array_size, child_parameters);
   274	                                if (all_ok && !ok) {
   275	                                        all_ok = false;
   276	                                        HandleCastError::AssignError(*child_parameters.error_message, parameters);
   277	                                }
   278	                                VectorOperations::Copy(list_cast_output, result_cc, array_size, 0, i * array_size);
   279	
   280	                                // Reset the cast_chunk
   281	                                cast_chunk.Reset();
   282	                        }
   283	                }
   284	
   285	                return all_ok;
   286	        }
   287	}
   288	
   289	BoundCastInfo DefaultCasts::ListCastSwitch(BindCastInput &input, const LogicalType &source, const LogicalType &target) {
   290	        switch (target.id()) {
   291	        case LogicalTypeId::LIST:
   292	                return BoundCastInfo(ListCast::ListToListCast, ListBoundCastData::BindListToListCast(input, source, target),
   293	                                     ListBoundCastData::InitListLocalState);
   294	        case LogicalTypeId::VARCHAR:
   295	                return BoundCastInfo(
   296	                    ListToVarcharCast,
   297	                    ListBoundCastData::BindListToListCast(input, source, LogicalType::LIST(LogicalType::VARCHAR)),
   298	                    ListBoundCastData::InitListLocalState);
   299	        case LogicalTypeId::ARRAY:
   300	                return BoundCastInfo(ListToArrayCast, BindListToArrayCast(input, source, target),
   301	                                     ListBoundCastData::InitListLocalState);
   302	        default:
   303	                return DefaultCasts::TryVectorNullCast;
   304	        }
   305	}

   309	 */
